summary_sections.title: Key Concepts: Physics & Engineering Applications of Vectors
summary_sections.content_html:
Physics & Engineering Applications

Statics: Equilibrium

For an object in equilibrium: ΣF = 0⃗ (all forces sum to zero).

Work & Energy

W = F · d = |F||d| cos θ.

Torque & Rotation

τ = r × F; magnitude = |r||F| sin θ.
